code: import React,{useState}from"react";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function LoginPage(_ref){let{onOtpRequested}=_ref;const[phone,setPhone]=useState("");const sendOtp=()=>{if(!phone){alert("Enter phone number");return;}const otp=Math.floor(100000+Math.random()*900000).toString();localStorage.setItem("demo_otp",otp);localStorage.setItem("phone",phone);alert("OTP sent: "+otp);onOtpRequested(phone,otp);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"page",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Online Fuel Delivery"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Enter your 10-digit mobile number to receive OTP."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"tel",placeholder:"10-digit phone number",value:phone,onChange:e=>setPhone(e.target.value),maxLength:10,required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:sendOtp,children:"Send OTP"})]})});}export default LoginPage;
